action.reasoning: The root task requires producing localized launch kits for 6 markets and a global consistency review. This is a large, parallelizable workload. I will spawn one subtask per market to handle the localization (announcement, FAQ, pricing) for that specific region. I will take the self_role of conducting the global consistency review, which depends on all market kits being completed. This decomposition ensures parallel progress and a final quality gate.

subtasks.goal: Produce localized launch kit for the US market.
subtasks.capsule: Create an announcement post, FAQ, and pricing page copy tailored for the US market. Use standard US English, appropriate cultural references, and USD pricing conventions. This serves the root goal by delivering one of the six required market kits.

outputs.description: Localized announcement post for US market.

expected_outputs.description: Localized announcement post for BR market.
Localized FAQ for BR market.
Localized pricing page copy for BR market.

action.reasoning: The task requires producing three distinct localized artifacts for the Brazilian market. While I could execute them sequentially, spawning parallel subtasks for each artifact (announcement, FAQ, pricing) is more efficient and leverages the multi-agent system's concurrency. Each subtask is independent in content generation but shares the same localization constraints (Brazilian Portuguese, BRL pricing, cultural nuances). I will assign one subtask to each artifact and take a self-role to integrate and review the outputs for consistency before fulfilling the interface pins.

subtasks.goal: Draft the localized announcement post for the Brazil market.
subtasks.capsule: Create an engaging announcement post in Brazilian Portuguese. Use culturally appropriate tone, references, and formatting. Ensure the message resonates with Brazilian users and highlights key product benefits relevant to the local market. This serves the root goal by delivering the BR announcement component.

outputs.description: Draft of the localized announcement post for BR.

subtasks.goal: Draft the localized FAQ for the Brazil market.
subtasks.capsule: Create a comprehensive FAQ in Brazilian Portuguese addressing common user questions. Include topics like pricing in BRL, local payment methods, support availability, and data privacy compliance (LGPD). Ensure tone is helpful and professional. This serves the root goal by delivering the BR FAQ component.

outputs.description: Draft of the localized FAQ for BR.

subtasks.goal: Draft the localized pricing page copy for the Brazil market.
subtasks.capsule: Create pricing page copy in Brazilian Portuguese with BRL pricing. Include clear plan descriptions, feature comparisons, and local payment options. Ensure pricing is formatted correctly for Brazil (e.g., R$ 99,90). This serves the root goal by delivering the BR pricing component.

outputs.description: Draft of the localized pricing page copy for BR.

self_role.goal: Review and finalize all three BR market artifacts, ensuring consistency and quality, then write them to the interface pins.
